name: HM MOVE
title: Diagnostics & Preventive Testing
description: Comprehensive diagnostic testing and preventive healthcare. Book lab visits or home collections with ease.
features: Browse comprehensive diagnostic categories
Book tests for yourself or family members
Seamless integration with digital health records
Real-time tracking of sample and reports

name: HM EASY
title: Home Sample Collection
description: Get your medical samples collected from the comfort of your home by certified professionals.
features: Schedule convenient home collection slots
Certified and trained phlebotomists
Strict hygiene and safety protocols
Direct integration with top diagnostic labs

name: HM TRUST
title: Doctor Consultation
description: Consult with top doctors and specialists globally, both online and at home.
features: Browse verified doctors by specialty
Book online consultations or home visits
Receive digital prescriptions
Direct follow-up on diagnostic reports

name: HM RELY
title: NRI Parent Care
description: Dedicated healthcare management for NRI parents living in India.
features: Manage parent profiles and medical history remotely
Book diagnostics, home care, and doctor visits for parents
Receive real-time notifications on parent's health updates
Access and share parent's digital health records

name: HM OHR
title: Digital Health Records
description: Secure, centralized storage for all your family's medical reports and prescriptions.
features: Automatic upload of HealthMetro diagnostic reports
Secure access and sharing with doctors
Manage records for yourself, family, and parents
End-to-end encryption for privacy

name: HM CLIN
title: Clinical Research Support
description: Participate in global clinical studies and contribute to medical advancements.
features: Discover available clinical studies
Read detailed study requirements and benefits
Secure application process
Contribute to global healthcare research
